since_last: 59% of 99 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.70%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 59% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.82% · Gold -0.54% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 59% of 99 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.70%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.70%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -0.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +3.65%
cards.body: Leaders: META +3.65%, BABA +1.99%, CGNX +1.55%, UEC +1.53%, NOW +1.45%. Laggards: INTC -2.22%, NXPI -1.78%, AMAT -1.63%, LRCX -1.63%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.31% at $150.17
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.31% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
